title: Databricks Lakehouse for Real-time Omnicom Analytics
summary: This solution recommends Databricks to replace Azure Synapse, with a path toward the potential AWS migration.
insight: The biggest mistake is over-engineering for AI/ML when the real need is low-latency BI.

evaluated.name: Databricks Enterprise
evaluated.reason: Strong lakehouse for the stated real-time needs.

evaluated.name: Snowflake Enterprise
evaluated.reason: Excellent for BI but weaker for the AI/ML roadmap.

evaluated.name: Microsoft Fabric
evaluated.reason: Best only if staying 100% on Azure.

evaluated.name: AWS Redshift
evaluated.reason: Locks into AWS during an undecided migration.

tools.name: Databricks Enterprise
tools.whyForYou: Handles the real-time and AI/ML workloads on Azure with an AWS path.

permissions.name: Databricks workspace admin
permissions.why: Needed to provision the workspace and manage users during setup.

permissions.name: Azure Data Factory managed identity
permissions.why: Lets the pipeline connect to Dynamics F&O and Databricks without stored credentials.
